behavior_summary: This script implements the NPC Stellos: short descriptions for 'U8P_STELLOS::look', a talk/U8P_STELLOS::use conversation handler, daily-U8P_STELLOS::schedule selection, area-entry/exit fast triggers, reactions to being U8P_STELLOS::cast on, and reactions when the Avatar steals from him.

U8P_STELLOS::look (process) returns a short description: shows a corpse line if Npc::isDead(this) is true; otherwise selects among 'Stellos the monk', 'Stellos', 'monk', or 'man' based on global flags stellosName and stellosJob.

U8P_STELLOS::schedule (process) queries the time-of-day (FREE::getTimeOfDayPeriod), computes temporary timing/selector locals, spawns an external chooser (METHOD::func143A), and on successful process_result() writes stellosSchedule and calls a commit action (METHOD::func133F).

U8P_STELLOS::enterFastArea (process) resets targeting refs and dispatches behavior based on stellosSchedule (U8P_STELLOS::func0BAD for U8P_STELLOS::schedule==1, U8P_STELLOS::func054E for U8P_STELLOS::schedule==2); it is skipped if the NPC is dead.
U8P_STELLOS::leaveFastArea (process) clears stellosJustHealed, resets references, and if the NPC is dead teleports/relocates the corpse with small random offsets — a cleanup handler.

U8P_STELLOS::cast (process, param uword) is the NPC's spell-target reaction: it uses Npc::getTarget(this) and when the selector path matches it runs a multi-stage effect sequence that spawns helper processes, toggles a status flag (interpreted as temporary immortality), updates item frame(s), then clears immortal, sets the NPC dead, and teleports it — inferred as a death/visual-effect sequence.

U8P_STELLOS::AvatarStoleSomething (process, param uword) reacts to theft: copies the param, resets refs, calls a talk-setup helper (METHOD::func091C), barks, spawns a short helper (FREE::func1C19) and dispatches a local reaction routine (U8P_STELLOS::func0211).

U8P_STELLOS::func054E (function) is a pathfinding/interaction helper: inspects Item::getFrame for a target, tries Npc::pathfind, waits on process_result(), and on success either calls U8P_STELLOS::func06A1 (short monologue) or plays animations/spawns effects; it retries with counters on failure.

U8P_STELLOS::func06A1, U8P_STELLOS::func0BAD, U8P_STELLOS::func0DC5 are monologue/behavior helpers: they play randomized barks, spawn animations (Npc::doAnim), and U8P_STELLOS::use small helper spawns/timers (FREE::func1C19) to sequence speech/gesture. U8P_STELLOS::func0BAD appears to be a 'meditate/refresh' routine.

U8P_STELLOS::use (process) builds dynamic conversation menus (MenuSet/MenuUnion/MenuRemove/MenuAdd into local2), presents an Ask, captures the selection into local1, and dispatches choices (strcmp) with side effects including calls to AIRSPEL::func1E4B and METHOD::func091C and writes to flags where appropriate.
notable_control_flow: U8P_STELLOS::schedule: guards on Npc::isDead(this) early, branches on FREE::getTimeOfDayPeriod(), spawns METHOD::func143A then suspends; after resume uses (word)process_result() to decide whether to write stellosSchedule and call METHOD::func133F.

U8P_STELLOS::enterFastArea: early Npc::isDead check; unconditional resets (resetRef) then a switch on stellosSchedule to call either U8P_STELLOS::func0BAD (U8P_STELLOS::schedule==1) or U8P_STELLOS::func054E (U8P_STELLOS::schedule==2).
U8P_STELLOS::leaveFastArea: clears stellosJustHealed and resets multiple refs; if Npc::isDead(this) then teleport with random offsets (urandom) — cleanup path for corpse handling.

U8P_STELLOS::cast: loads/overwrites param with Npc::getTarget(this), uses a small loop with local1 as a retry counter spawning FREE::func1C19 if no target, then on param==1 executes a long sequence of spawn+suspend calls (FREE::func29D8, METHOD::func15E7), toggles a status flag, changes item frame(s), then clears immortal, sets dead, and teleports.

U8P_STELLOS::use: constructs menu in local2 with multiple conditional MenuAdd/MenuRemove/MenuUnion calls based on progression flags (stellosMet, passedWisdomTest, etc.), presents Ask -> SuspendAssign(local1), then uses IfStatement strcmp(local1) to route to dialogue branches, invoking external helpers where needed.
open_questions: Exact numeric semantics of U8P_STELLOS::schedule selector values written into stellosSchedule (observed 0x01 and 0x02) — what concrete behaviors beyond the two observed functions do they map to?
Precise gameplay effect of the status flag toggled in U8P_STELLOS::cast (METHOD::toggleStatusFlag with 0x10) — inferred as temporary immortality/protection but not certain.
Detailed purposes and lifetimes of spawned helper processes (FREE::func1C19, FREE::func29D8, METHOD::func15E7): visual effect vs timing vs gameplay mechanics is inferred but not explicit.
The complete set of conversation branches and menu-text keys in U8P_STELLOS::use() (only menu-building mechanics are shown; exact strings/choices beyond sampled barks are partially reconstructed).
U8P_STELLOS::func0211 is called from U8P_STELLOS::AvatarStoleSomething but is not present in the primary function list extract — its contents and full role are unknown.

main_function.name: U8P_STELLOS::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the short description when the player examines Stellos; returns a corpse description if dead otherwise picks among name/job/generic variants using stellosName and stellosJob flags.
entry_conditions: Invoked by the engine when the player examines or 'looks at' the NPC.
Performs a guard check Npc::isDead(this) to determine corpse vs alive description.

function_map.name: U8P_STELLOS::look
function_map.role: short examine/description handler (shows corpse or name/job variants)

function_map.name: U8P_STELLOS::schedule
function_map.role: choose daily/short-term U8P_STELLOS::schedule based on time-of-day and commit selection to stellosSchedule

function_map.name: U8P_STELLOS::enterFastArea
function_map.role: area-entry fast trigger: reset refs and dispatch U8P_STELLOS::schedule-driven behavior routines

function_map.name: U8P_STELLOS::leaveFastArea
function_map.role: area-exit cleanup: clear just-healed flag, reset refs, teleport dead NPCs

function_map.name: U8P_STELLOS::cast
function_map.role: handle being targeted by spells/effects — multi-stage effect sequence possibly leading to death/teleport

function_map.name: U8P_STELLOS::AvatarStoleSomething
function_map.role: react to theft: reset refs, call talk-setup and run a reaction routine

function_map.name: U8P_STELLOS::func054E
function_map.role: pathfind/interact utility: inspect an item, attempt pathfinding, then either greet or animate on success/failure

function_map.name: U8P_STELLOS::func06A1
function_map.role: short monologue/greeting routine with randomized barks and animations

function_map.name: U8P_STELLOS::func0BAD
function_map.role: meditation/rest monologue routine used when U8P_STELLOS::schedule==1

function_map.name: U8P_STELLOS::func0DC5
function_map.role: alternate idle/interaction monologue with varied barks/animations

function_map.name: U8P_STELLOS::use
function_map.role: conversation/talk handler: build dynamic menu, Ask, capture choice and branch into dialogue and side-effect calls

internal_calls.purpose: Invoke short greeting/interaction on successful pathfinding when nobody is talking
Call greeting helper as an alternative or part of the meditate sequence
Hand off to a local reaction routine after the initial theft bark and spawn

external_calls.purpose: Check whether the NPC is dead to select corpse vs alive description
Get time-of-day period to determine U8P_STELLOS::schedule branch constants
Spawn/request a chooser/pathfinder process and then wait for its result
Commit or execute the chosen scheduled action when spawned process succeeds
Clear reference slots (focus/target state) before dispatching behavior
Relocate dead NPCs when leaving fast area (random small offsets)
Inspect target item frame/index to choose interaction behavior
Request movement toward a target and wait on its process result
Prepare talk/face context immediately prior to many barks
Obtain target/state into param to decide which U8P_STELLOS::cast reaction path to run
Spawn or trigger timed visual/effect steps during the U8P_STELLOS::cast sequence
Spawn helper visual/timer processes as part of the U8P_STELLOS::cast effect sequence
Invoke air-spell related helper from a dialog/menu branch

reads.name: stellosName
reads.likely_effect: Controls inclusion of NPC proper name in U8P_STELLOS::look() description

reads.name: stellosJob
reads.likely_effect: Controls inclusion of NPC job/title ('monk') in U8P_STELLOS::look() description

reads.name: stellosMet
reads.likely_effect: Gates initial greeting variation and baseline menu options in U8P_STELLOS::use()

reads.name: attemptedWisdomTest
reads.likely_effect: Used by U8P_STELLOS::use() to decide whether to present 'Test of Wisdom' related menu options

reads.name: passedWisdomTest
reads.likely_effect: Alters dialogue/menu progression for wisdom-test related branching

reads.name: attemptedCenteredTest
reads.likely_effect: Used with other flags to gate centered-test menu options

reads.name: passedCenteredTest
reads.likely_effect: Alters menu options and conversation branches related to centered test

reads.name: passedThirdTest
reads.likely_effect: Enables advanced dialogue choices and interacts with foci/quest progression

reads.name: hasOwnFoci
reads.likely_effect: Gates foci-related menu options in U8P_STELLOS::use()

reads.name: somebodyTalking
reads.likely_effect: Prevents intrusive long monologues; influences U8P_STELLOS::func054E/U8P_STELLOS::func0BAD to choose shorter interaction (U8P_STELLOS::func06A1)

reads.name: torwinJumped
reads.likely_effect: Used to pick between alternate barks referencing Torwin in U8P_STELLOS::func0DC5

reads.name: torwinMet
reads.likely_effect: Used to add menu option 'I have met Torwin' in U8P_STELLOS::use() when appropriate

reads.name: xavierMet
reads.likely_effect: Used to add menu option 'I have spoken with Brother Xavier' in U8P_STELLOS::use() when appropriate

reads.name: cyrrusMet
reads.likely_effect: Used to add menu option 'I spoke with Holy Cyrrus' in U8P_STELLOS::use() when appropriate

writes.name: stellosSchedule
writes.likely_effect: Store the chosen short-term U8P_STELLOS::schedule id (selector) for later dispatch by U8P_STELLOS::enterFastArea

writes.name: stellosJustHealed
writes.likely_effect: Cleared (set to 0) by U8P_STELLOS::leaveFastArea() as a cleanup marker indicating the NPC is no longer in a 'just healed' state

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script implements the NPC Stellos: short descriptions for 'U8P_STELLOS::look', a talk/U8P_STELLOS::use conversation handler, daily-U8P_STELLOS::schedule selection, area-entry/exit fast triggers, reactions to being U8P_STELLOS::cast on, and reactions when the Avatar steals from him.
